name: Sausage-Cheddar Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Line quiche or pie pan with pastry.
2. Bake for 10 minutes.
3. Cook sausage with onions until brown, then drain.
4. Combine sausage with mushrooms, parsley flakes, garlic, Cheddar cheese, eggs, and chopped green pepper in a bowl. Mix well.
5. Spoon the mixture into the crust and top with additional cheese.
6. Whisk milk and eggs together until foamy. Pour over the cheese.
7. Sprinkle with paprika and bake at 325°F for 50 minutes or until the cheese is lightly browned and the quiche is set.
